channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New tax rules are in effect this season—and many filers don’t know about them
item.description: Tax filing season is in full swing, and while preparing your taxes can often be filled with stress, misplaced documents, and worries about proper fili...

item.title: The ultrawealthy have 3 big secrets on reducing taxes including the way they die
item.description: “Assets like stocks can quietly grow for decades and, when they’re inherited, the tax bill often disappears.”

item.title: How This AI-Powered Machine Turns Photos Into Smells
item.description: The Anemoia Device uses generative models to bring memories to life.

item.title: Why AI Keeps Failing Inside Companies—and the Simple Playbook That Actually Works
item.description: Here are four practical and proven approaches to getting through implementation blocks.

item.title: Apple Announces ‘Special’ Launch Event: Here’s What to Expect
item.description: A “special Apple experience” showcasing new products and updates is slated for March 4 in New York, London and Singapore

item.title: Americans’ new tariff coffee math means ditching the Starbucks, McDonald’s and Dunkin’ runs
item.description: "Twenty cents a cup compared to $7 or $8 a cup. The math just makes sense."

item.title: Top Hollywood screenwriter warns TikTok’s new tool is at the gates: ‘I hate to say it. It’s likely over for us’
item.description: Seedance 2.0, which is only available in China for now, lets users generate high-quality AI videos using simple text prompts.

item.title: 23 Ways Executives Are Using AI
item.description: From taking a seat at the table to eliminating busywork, founders are integrating artificial intelligence into all parts of their operations.

item.title: Congress just passed a major housing bill. Will it actually lower your home price?
item.description: Housing affordability is a top concern for many Americans, and both chambers of Congress have been advancing legislation to help prospective homeowner...

item.title: What’s open and closed on Presidents’ Day 2026? Federal holiday hours for Costco, Target, banks, stocks, more
item.description: For Americans with conventional work schedules, Monday holidays are often a blessing. However, despite the extra weekend day, these observances can al...

item.title: While the U.S. marks Presidents’ Day, Lunar New Year begins for millions of Chinese Americans
item.description: In the United States, it’s one of our annual holidays today, Presidents’ Day, which celebrates the dozens of American presidents we’ve had over the ce...

item.title: Aspen is finally getting a second ski base village. It’s over 10 years in the making
item.description: After more than a decade of planning, an overlooked side of the ski haven of Aspen, Colorado, will soon be revamped into a new base village. Named Cha...

item.title: Wendy’s closes hundreds of restaurants after plunge in same-store sales worse than Wall Street expected
item.description: "One learning from 2025 around value, we swung the pendulum too far towards limited-time price promotions instead of everyday value."

item.title: Amazon’s Ring decides maybe partnering with a police surveillance firm is a bad idea after wide revulsion at Super Bowl ad
item.description: The Super Bowl ad depicts a lost dog being tracked by cameras throughout a neighborhood using artificial intelligence.

item.title: Scientists Identified a Hidden Cause of Workplace Burnout—And Most Employees Do It Daily
item.description: Sometimes following the unwritten rules and expectations of the office is the least helpful thing to do.
